name: Tests for format=incoming. Covers #614 and #984, both relating to making query output re-usable in wikitext.

setup.contents: A wiki page that receives incoming property connections.
{{#set:Is related to=Example/SRF0614/D.1 |Not to be confused with=Example/SRF0614/D.1 }}

tests.about: Checks output of #ask query with the incoming format. Since #614 was solved, should no longer be enclosed by a div element with class='srf-incoming'. Properties are alphabetically listed.
tests.subject: Example/SRF0614/Q.1

to-contain: Is related to;Not to be confused with

tests.about: Checks output of #show query with the incoming format. Since #614 was solved, should no longer be enclosed by a div element with class='srf-incoming'. Properties are alphabetically listed.
tests.subject: Example/SRF0614/Q.2

to-contain: Is related to;Not to be confused with

tests.about: Checks output of an #ask query, with the incoming format, on a page that has no incoming property connections. Since issue #984 was fixed, the output should be empty.
tests.subject: Example/SRF0984/Q.1
